Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Nov-04-2003 Continued To Jan-13-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Apportionment and Distribution of Settlement Funds hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Appearances:
Jamie M. Davenport, Esq. (L/O Paul, Hanley & Harley) for Plaintiffs' and Dawn Newton (L/O Fitzgerald Abbott & Beardsley) also for Plaintiff Maria McKinney (not present). Three of the five adult children, Barbara McKinney, Vicki McKinney and Raymond McKinney also appeared and were sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court continues the matter to JAN-13-2004 at 9:00 AM in Dept 218 for interested parties to obtain legal representation. All responsive papers are due Jan. 9, 2004.
Contact information is as follows:
Barbara McKinney - General Delivery, Redding, CA 96049 Phone # (530) 221-4056
Vicki McKinney - P.O. Box 20392, Castro Valley, CA 94546 Phone # (510) 209-8850 or
(510) 728-0146
Raymond McKinney, Geraldine Stimson and Linda McKinney can be contacted through
the address and phone numbers of Vicki McKinney.

THIS CASE IS CONSOLIDATED WITH #305140.
